title: Uruguayan Bamboo Shoot Casserole
description: A hearty, smoky casserole from Uruguay featuring bamboo shoots and a rich, intensely flavored sauce.
instructions: If using chorizo, cook in a pan over medium heat, breaking up with a spoon, until browned.
In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and cook until softened.
Add garlic, smoked paprika, chili flakes, and cumin. Cook for 1 minute.
Add bamboo shoots, tomato paste, and red wine. Stir to combine.
If using chorizo, add it to the pot and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
